title: lycopodium annotinum subsp. pungens
intro: Lycopodium annotinum subsp. pungens, also known as club moss or resurrection plant, is a type of evergreen plant that belongs to the lycopodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Lycopodium annotinum subsp. pungens include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and promote immune system function, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
